title: DS18B20 1-Wire Temperature Probe Array
design_question: How to accurately measure water temperature in an aquarium tank with a waterproof sensor?
selected_approach: Waterproof DS18B20 stainless-steel probe (TO-92 encapsulated, IP67 shrink-wrapped cable) on 1-Wire bus. Single 4.7 kΩ pull-up on data line; Arduino Dallas Temperature library for 12-bit (0.0625 °C) readings. Parasite power disabled; dedicated 3.3 V supply.
rationale: DS18B20 probe form factor is food-safe, fully submersible, and ±0.5 °C accurate from −10 °C to 85 °C. 1-Wire bus allows multiple sensors on one GPIO. Dallas Temperature library handles ROM enumeration and conversion timing transparently.

alternatives.reason_rejected: Requires ADC and calibration curve; non-linear; accuracy degrades over time without periodic recalibration.
Not waterproof; designed for air sensing, not liquid immersion.

verification_notes: FACT: 'DS18B20 1-Wire Digital Temperature Sensing' confirms ±0.5 °C accuracy, 12-bit resolution (0.0625 °C), and waterproof probe availability.
